00017 #ifndef FFPLUGINMANAGER_STANDARD
00018 #define FFPLUGINMANAGER_STANDARD
00019 
00020 
00021 #include "FreeFrame.h"
00022 
00023 
00042 
00043 class CFFPluginManager {
00044 
00045 public:
00046 
00054         enum FormatsFlags {
00055                 FF_RGB_16 = 0x1,                        
00056                 FF_RGB_24 = 0x2,                        
00057                 FF_RGB_32 = 0x4                         
00058         };
00059 
00067         enum OptimizationFlags {
00068                 FF_OPT_NONE             = 0x1,          
00069                 FF_OPT_INPLACE  = 0x2,          
00070                 FF_OPT_COPY             = 0x4,          
00071                 FF_OPT_BOTH             = 0x8           
00072         };
00073 
00075         virtual ~CFFPluginManager();
00076 
00082         bool IsProcessFrameCopySupported() const;
00083         
00089         DWORD GetSupportedFormat() const;
00090 
00097         DWORD GetSupportedOptimization() const;
00098         
00103         int GetMinInputs() const;
00104         
00109         int GetMaxInputs() const;
00110         
00115         int GetNumParams() const;
00116         
00125         char* GetParamName(DWORD dwIndex) const;
00126         
00135         DWORD GetParamType(DWORD dwIndex) const;
00136 
00145         void* GetParamDefault(DWORD dwIndex) const;
00146 
00153         void SetVideoInfo(const VideoInfoStruct* pVideoInfo);
00154 
00155 
00156 protected:
00157 
00162         CFFPluginManager();
00163 
00170         void SetProcessFrameCopySupported(bool bIsSupported);
00171 
00177         void SetSupportedFormats(DWORD dwFlags);
00178 
00185         void SetSupportedOptimizations(DWORD dwFlags);
00186         
00193         void SetMinInputs(int iMinInputs);
00194         
00201         void SetMaxInputs(int iMaxInputs);
00202 
00217         void SetParamInfo(DWORD dwIndex, const char* pchName, DWORD dwType, float fDefaultValue);
00218         
00232         void SetParamInfo(DWORD dwIndex, const char* pchName, DWORD dwType, bool bDefaultValue);
00233 
00246         void SetParamInfo(DWORD dwIndex, const char* pchName, DWORD dwType, const char* pchDefaultValue);
00247 
00252         int GetFrameWidth() const;
00253         
00258         int GetFrameHeight() const;
00259 
00265         DWORD GetFrameDepth() const;
00266 
00272         DWORD GetFrameOrientation() const;
00273 
00274 private:
00275                 
00276         // Structure for keeping information about each plugin parameter
00277         typedef struct ParamInfoStruct {
00278                 DWORD ID;                                                       
00279                 char Name[16];                                  
00280                 DWORD dwType;                                   
00281                 float DefaultValue;                             
00282                 char* StrDefaultValue;                  
00283                 ParamInfoStruct* pNext; 
00284         } ParamInfo;
00285 
00286         // Information on paramters and pointers to ParamInfo list
00287         int m_NParams;
00288         ParamInfo* m_pFirst;
00289         ParamInfo* m_pLast;
00290 
00291         // Plugin capabilities
00292         bool m_bIsProcessFrameCopySupported;
00293         DWORD m_dwSupportedFormats;
00294         DWORD m_dwSupportedOptimizations;
00295         
00296         // Inputs
00297         int m_iMinInputs;
00298         int m_iMaxInputs;
00299 
00300         // Information on the incoming images
00301         VideoInfoStruct m_VideoInfo;
00302 };
00303 
00304 
00305 #include "FFPluginManager_inl.h"
00306 
00307 #endif
